title: First Completely Painted Row or Column

testcases.input: arr = [1,3,4,2], mat = [[1,4],[2,3]] Output: 2 Explanation: The moves are shown in order, and both the first row and second column of the matrix become fully painted at arr[2].
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The moves are shown in order, and both the first row and second column of the matrix become fully painted at arr[2].

testcases.input: arr = [2,8,7,4,1,3,5,6,9], mat = [[3,2,5],[1,4,6],[8,7,9]] Output: 3 Explanation: The second column becomes fully painted at arr[3].
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: The second column becomes fully painted at arr[3].
